title: Im-Urlaub
compiled_truth: Im-Urlaub is an external contact at [T-online](companies/t-online). Over the corpus period (2000-11-30 to 2001-11-20), Im-Urlaub sent 21 and received 14 emails, totalling 35 interactions. Top correspondents: [Scott Hendrickson](people/scott-hendrickson) (20), [Kimberly S Olinger](people/kimberly-s-olinger) (6), [Bdarter](people/bdarter-coral-energy) (5), [Melissa Barroso](people/melissa-barroso-compaq) (4), [Onvacation](people/onvacation-pdq) (4).
